concept: My brain has too many tabs open
title: Funny relatable brain overload quote - My brain has too many tabs open shirt
description:
Feeling like your mental browser constantly crashes from too many open tabs? Same. This witty design perfectly captures the incessant juggling act that is adulting, chronic overthinking, and trying to stay sane amidst the chaos. Whether you’re drowning in work emails, parenting logistics, or attempting to remember why you walked into the room, it’s all just...too much. Let your shirt do the talking while your brain quietly buffers. 

Perfect for:
- Constant overthinkers who can’t seem to close those mental tabs.
- Parents juggling schedules, snacks, and sanity.
- Professionals feeling like their inbox is plotting their downfall.
- Anyone who occasionally forgets what day it is. 

DETAILS: Made to order. Available in a full range of light and dark colors to match your style. Bold typography reads “My brain has too many tabs open” in a playful stacked layout with tiny browser tab icons. Crisp vector artwork printed with vibrant, durable inks. Transparent background.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
